description_long: This is a whimsical, custom-built car with a flatbed stage on the rear, featuring a full drum kit, electric guitars, a microphone stand, and an amplifier, suggesting a mobile music performance setup. The front of the car has a classic vintage design with blue flame decals on the hood and fenders, a large chrome grille, and spoked wheels. The cab is open with a single bench seat, a steering wheel, and visible dashboard controls. The flatbed is black and spacious, supporting the musical instruments securely, and the rear has a license plate reading 'YOYO'. The car has six wheels, with the rear four supporting the extended flatbed. The overall appearance combines elements of a parade float, a classic car, and a mobile concert stage, making it highly unique and eye-catching.
description: A vintage-style car with a flatbed stage carrying a drum kit, guitars, and music equipment, decorated with blue flames and a 'YOYO' license plate. It blends classic automotive design with a mobile concert setup.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vintage grille, blue flame hood, and partial view of the drum kit and instruments on the flatbed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open cab, steering wheel, blue flame fenders, and the full array of musical instruments on the flatbed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the drum kit, guitars, microphone, amplifier, and the 'YOYO' license plate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open cab, dashboard, and the arrangement of musical instruments on the flatbed.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights, classic vintage style
